  "findings": [
    "Grounding electrode conductor (GEC) spliced improperly"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-splice the grounding electrode conductor using an irreversible compression fitting, exothermic welding, or replace the conductor with a continuous unspliced length."
  ],
  "rationale": "The grounding electrode conductor (GEC) must be continuous without splice unless spliced by irreversible compression-type connectors listed as grounding and bonding equipment or by the exothermic welding process, per NEC 250.64(C). An improper splice violates code and compromises the safety of the entire grounding system.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 250.64(C)"
  ]
}
